name: Zesty Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 medium red bell pepper, cored and seeded, diced
1 medium yellow bell pepper, cored and seeded, diced
2 cups cooked yellow or white sweet corn kernels
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, cilantro, cumin, salt, and pepper.
2. Add lima beans, black beans, red kidney beans, red and yellow bell peppers, onion, corn, and jalapeno peppers.
3. Gently toss the ingredients until well combined.
4. Chill the salad in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
5. Garnish with cilantro sprigs before serving.
